title: Removal of Claims or Parties
text:
[[Name of plaintiff ]’s claim for [ insert claim ] is no longer an issue in this
case.]
[[Name of party ] is no longer a party to this case.]
Do not speculate as to why this [claim/person] is no longer involved in
this case. Y ou should not consider this during your deliberations.
New September 2003
directions_for_use: This instruction may be read during trial as appropriate.
